title: mo:os Superset Ontology v3
description: Complete categorical ontology for the mo:os Universal Graph Model. Single source of truth for kinds, morphisms, categories, and functors. Contingent instances live in ../instances/.

objects.name: User
objects.description: Authenticated actor — container whose morphisms grant owned-workspace access edges. No special ontological status.

objects.name: ColliderAdmin
objects.description: Category administrator — elevated actor with governed OWNS edges to assigned containers.

objects.name: SuperAdmin
objects.description: Root administrator — transitive OWNS over all containers.

objects.name: AppTemplate
objects.description: Template container — reusable subgraph pattern. Instantiation = ADD + LINK sequence.

objects.name: NodeContainer
objects.description: General-purpose container — default object in C. Payload in state_payload JSONB.

objects.name: AgnosticModel
objects.description: LLM/ML model container — provider-agnostic URN. Provider config in state_payload.

objects.name: SystemTool
objects.description: Tool container — discovered via graph traversal, exposed via MCP protocol surface.

objects.name: UI_Lens
objects.description: UI rendering surface — functor output: containers × wires → React component tree.

objects.name: RuntimeSurface
objects.description: Execution surface — HTTP/WS/MCP endpoint. Tools wire here to become executable.

objects.name: ComputeResource
objects.description: GPU device, Docker container, thread pool, VM — schedulable resource container.

objects.name: ProtocolAdapter
objects.description: WS channel, MCP session, gRPC stream, HTTP endpoint — routable communication container.

objects.name: InfraService
objects.description: Postgres instance, disk volume, network segment — persistable infrastructure container.

objects.name: MemoryStore
objects.description: Vector embedding store, context window, conversation history — ephemeral or persistent memory container.

objects.name: PlatformConfig
objects.description: Platform distribution configuration — paths, store mode, build targets. Typed representation of distribution.json entries.

objects.name: WorkstationConfig
objects.description: Workstation environment descriptor — OS, runtime ports, optional services. Typed representation of workstation.json entries.

objects.name: Preference
objects.description: Runtime preference — key-value wire_config with scope (system/workspace/user/session). Typed representation of preferences.json entries.

objects.name: Provider
objects.description: LLM/AI provider container — adapter_type, API config, rate limits. OWNS model containers (OBJ06). Typed representation of providers.json entries.

objects.name: BenchmarkSuite
objects.description: Named benchmark collection — groups BenchmarkTask entries. Definition object, immutable after creation.

objects.name: BenchmarkTask
objects.description: Individual benchmark task definition — prompt template, expected morphisms, difficulty. Immutable after creation.

objects.name: BenchmarkScore
objects.description: Benchmark result record — model’s scores on a task within a suite. Immutable once recorded. Sources MOR14/15/16.

objects.name: AgentSpec
objects.description: Agent specification container — model binding, tool routing, state sync. The configured persona that acts on behalf of a User.

morphisms.name: OWNS
morphisms.description: Ownership edge — automatic transitive propagation.

morphisms.name: CAN_HYDRATE
morphisms.description: Hydration permission — declared transitivity controlled by manifest/wire_config.

morphisms.name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
morphisms.description: Runtime configuration — sets initial state before activation.

morphisms.name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
morphisms.description: State synchronization — surface pushes current state to container.

morphisms.name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
morphisms.description: Create + wire container into ownership tree.

morphisms.name: LINK_NODES
morphisms.description: General-purpose wiring — creates edge with specified port types.

morphisms.name: UPDATE_NODE_KERNEL
morphisms.description: Kernel-level state update.

morphisms.name: UNLINK_EDGE
morphisms.description: Remove wire. Container persists. May create orphan nodes. (Renamed from DELETE_EDGE in v2 to align with §3 canonical NT name.)

morphisms.name: CAN_SCHEDULE
morphisms.description: Workload allocation — kernel/admin schedules work to compute resource.

morphisms.name: CAN_ROUTE
morphisms.description: Transport selection — protocol adapter routes traffic.

morphisms.name: CAN_PERSIST
morphisms.description: Storage routing — container persists state through infra.

morphisms.name: CAN_FEDERATE
morphisms.description: Cross-instance communication — morphism bundle exchange between mo:os instances.

morphisms.name: CAN_FORK
morphisms.description: Branch parallel exploration — fork active state graph into GPU VRAM for parallel DAG scoring.

morphisms.name: SCORED_ON
morphisms.description: Model achieved this benchmark score. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

morphisms.name: EVALUATES_TASK
morphisms.description: Score applies to this task definition. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

morphisms.name: BENCHMARKED_BY
morphisms.description: Score belongs to this benchmark suite. New in v3 — cross-provider mapping (§9).

morphisms.name: ADD
morphisms.description: Create container — URN enters Ob(C)

morphisms.name: LINK
morphisms.description: Create wire — edge enters Hom(C)

morphisms.name: MUTATE
morphisms.description: Update container state — endomorphism

morphisms.name: UNLINK
morphisms.description: Remove wire — edge leaves Hom(C)
